title: Project active .aof operating state into visibility outputs automatically
description: TASK-005 made cadence state displayable through the existing visibility contract. The next gap is producer automation: operators still need a separate status/timeline/flow producer to populate those fields from live .aof artifacts.
triage_notes: Closed by v2.6 runtime-backed visibility export; status_card, timeline_feed, and flow_snapshot now project directly from live .aof state.
